name: rinawarp-terminal-pro
description: RinaWarp Terminal Pro - AI-powered system diagnostic agent
author: RinaWarp Team <team@rinawarptech.com>

scripts.build:electron: npm run build:preload && tsc -b tsconfig.json && node scripts/copy-static.mjs
scripts.test:playwright:ci: CI=1 pnpm build:electron && playwright test -c tests/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:playwright:smoke: pnpm build:electron && playwright test rina-tools.smoke.spec.ts smoke.electron.spec.ts -c tests/playwright.config.ts --workers=4
scripts.test:playwright:ipc: pnpm build:electron && playwright test rina-ipc -c tests/playwright.config.ts --workers=4
scripts.test:playwright:tools: pnpm build:electron && playwright test rina-tools -c tests/playwright.config.ts --workers=4
scripts.dev:terminal: cross-env RINAWARP_DEV=1 npm run continuous-smoke && npm run dev
scripts.e2e:smoke: unset FORCE_COLOR && unset NO_COLOR && unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE && npm run build:electron && playwright test -c tests/playwright.config.ts
scripts.e2e:smoke:headed: unset FORCE_COLOR && unset NO_COLOR && unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE && npm run build:electron && playwright test -c tests/playwright.config.ts --headed
scripts.dev: unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE && npm run build:electron && npx electron .
scripts.build:all: npm run build:electron && npm run package:linux && npm run package:win
